pattern: Treating zeros as -1 turns equal-count subarrays into zero-sum ranges, found via the first prefix-sum repeat using a hash map of earliest indices.
hints: Rewrite each 0 as -1 so an equal number of 0s and 1s becomes a running sum of zero.
If the running sum repeats at two positions, the slice between them has a net sum of zero.
Walk the array keeping a prefix sum; store the first index each sum value is seen, and whenever a sum recurs the gap to its first occurrence is a candidate length.

edge_inputs.description: best window is interior, not whole array
balance achieved across the entire array
leading imbalance then long balanced tail

stress.description: random binary array of moderate size
